system.description:
Effect: Junomon may change between Hysteric Mode and normal mode as a Complex Action.

When in it's normal form, Junomon may use one @Trait[command] action per activation as a Free Action instead of it's normal action cost.

When in Hysteric Form, Junomon becomes immune to @Affliction[bound], @Affliction[grapple] and @Affliction[grounded]. If it had any of these afflictions at the time of changing forms, it is immediately cured of them.
